title: Snake
description: The classic grid-crawler. Eat, grow, and try not to run into yourself. Arrow keys or swipe to steer.
Slide and merge numbered tiles to build up to 2048 (and beyond). One wrong move and it's over.

title: Tic-Tac-Toe
description: Play against a minimax-perfect AI. Good luck ever beating it - a draw is the best you'll usually get.

title: Particle Playground
description: A reactive particle field that follows your cursor. Click to burst, drag to paint trails of light.

title: Falling Sand
description: A pixel-physics sandbox. Drop sand, water, and stone and watch them settle, flow, and pile up.

title: Word Guess
description: Guess the hidden 5-letter word in 6 tries. Green means right spot, yellow means wrong spot.

title: Sliding Puzzle
description: Shuffle the 15-tile board, then slide pieces back into numerical order as fast as you can.

title: Reaction Test
description: Wait for the screen to flash, then click as fast as you can. Measures your reaction time in milliseconds.

title: Aim Trainer
description: Targets pop up at random - click them before they disappear. Tracks accuracy and average speed.
